Records.authors: Usyukina, Natalia I., Davydychev, Andrei I.
Records.description: Two-loop non-planar (crossed) three-point diagram with massless propagators and all off-shell external momenta. Symmetric under all permutations of external legs. Factorizes as the square of the one-loop triangle $C^{(1)}$, yielding products of dilogarithms.

Two-loop massless symmetric three-point integral family with denominators D_1=l1^2, D_2=(l1+q3)^2, D_4=l2^2, D_5=(l2-q2)^2, D_6=(l1-l2)^2, D_7=(l1-l2-q1)^2 at the symmetric subtraction point q_i^2=-mu^2, q1+q2+q3=0. Top topology is the K_{2,3} graph (two interior 3-vertices, three exterior 3-vertices, each carrying one external leg). Seven master integrals after IBP reduction (six in this family plus the factorized M^{(2)}_{5,1}); two are factorized products of one-loop integrals (M^{(2)}_{4,1}, M^{(2)}_{5,1}). Master integrals taken from Usyukina-Davydychev (1994) for M^{(2)}_{5,2}, M^{(2)}_{6,1}; Davydychev hypergeometric form for triangle subgraphs; cross-checked numerically with Feynman parametrization. Results expanded through O(eps^1) for top sectors and higher orders for sub-sectors as required by spurious poles. The seventh denominator D_3=(l1-q2)^2 (an ISP for the K_{2,3} top topology) becomes a propagator only in the factorized M^{(2)}_{5,1}=triangle x bubble sub-sector, hence listed under numerators.
Records.familyName: Massless 2-loop 3-point at symmetric point (6 propagators, K_{2,3} graph)
Records.location: Section III, Fig.~MI (top topology M^{(2)}_{6,1}); denominators D_1, D_2, D_4, D_5, D_6, D_7 in the denominator list; ISP D_3=(l1-q2)^2 is the seventh auxiliary denominator used in the M^{(2)}_{5,1} factorized sub-sector. Master integral results in Eqs.~(eq:M231)--(eq:M261); higher-eps tails (H_{31}^{(2)}, H_{43}^{(2)}) discussed in Appendix.

Names: $Massless 2-loop 3-point at symmetric point (6 propagators, K_{2,3} graph)$
